title: Diplodium decurvum
taxonomy: Diplodium decurvum is classified as a species of orchid. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Diplodium, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Australia and New Zealand. Diplodium decurvum is further classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchids. By grouping Diplodium decurvum with other orchids, scientists can better understand the plant's biology and ecology.
